testcase.classname: Notification APIs 201 - should send in-app notification
testcase.name: Notification APIs 201 - should send in-app notification

testcase.classname: Notification APIs GET user notifications should return pagination payload
testcase.name: Notification APIs GET user notifications should return pagination payload

testcase.classname: Notification APIs GET unread-count should return unreadCount
testcase.name: Notification APIs GET unread-count should return unreadCount

testcase.classname: Notification APIs PATCH /:id/read should mark notification as read
testcase.name: Notification APIs PATCH /:id/read should mark notification as read

testcase.classname: Notification APIs PATCH /read-all should return 400 when userId is missing
testcase.name: Notification APIs PATCH /read-all should return 400 when userId is missing

testcase.classname: Notification APIs PATCH /read-all should mark all user notifications as read
testcase.name: Notification APIs PATCH /read-all should mark all user notifications as read

testcase.classname: Notification APIs GET user notifications with invalid userId should return empty payload
testcase.name: Notification APIs GET user notifications with invalid userId should return empty payload

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs 401 - should reject conversation requests without auth headers
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs 401 - should reject conversation requests without auth headers

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs GET /users should return communication users excluding current user
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs GET /users should return communication users excluding current user

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs POST / should create conversation with recipient
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs POST / should create conversation with recipient

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs POST /:id/messages should send message and create recipient notification
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs POST /:id/messages should send message and create recipient notification

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs GET /:id/messages should return conversation and messages
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs GET /:id/messages should return conversation and messages

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/messages/:messageId should update sender's message
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/messages/:messageId should update sender's message

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/messages/:messageId should reject updates from non-sender
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/messages/:messageId should reject updates from non-sender

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs DELETE /:id/messages/:messageId should delete sender message
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs DELETE /:id/messages/:messageId should delete sender message

testcase.classname: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/read should mark conversation as read
testcase.name: Conversation and Message APIs PATCH /:id/read should mark conversation as read
